name: stage2-rvv-production-selected-dispatch-admission
title: Stage2 RVV production-kernel selected-dispatch performance-admission campaign
description: Macro campaign for Stage2 RVV production-kernel selected-dispatch performance admission. Gate 1 hardened selected-dispatch case/fallback mirror tie-back; Gate 2 carries packed-i4 no-win policy output through provider-owned selected-dispatch facts into target mirrors.
creator: codex
notes: Gate 1 slice complete: RVVLowPrecisionPerformancePolicy verifies selected-dispatch case/fallback mirrors against structured dispatch boundary fields, and target artifact validation rejects stale provider selected-dispatch mirrors even when candidate metadata matches them. Gate 2 slice complete: packed-i4 no-win policy output is populated as provider-owned selected-dispatch policy-output facts, emitted as target/header mirrors, and rejected when stale or metadata-only. Gate 3 slice complete: explicit same-target no-win/measured-win records can populate selected-dispatch policy-output facts through provider-owned C++ contracts, with stale target records rejected before target mirrors are accepted. Gate 4 slice complete: existing source-backed ssh rvv packed-i4 same-target evidence roots now feed the evidence-root parser, record-aware selected-dispatch policy-output path, provider-owned target/header mirrors, and no-win correctness-fallback admission/denial behavior. No fresh ssh rvv run was required in the final slice because it consumes existing source-backed ssh rvv evidence roots and changes only policy/test handoff coverage, not generated runtime behavior or timing values.
